landing.heroTitle: Build, manage, and scale your entire education system — in one platform
landing.heroSubtitle: From course creation to AI-graded exams, real-time quizzes, and certified achievements — everything your organization needs to deliver world-class education at scale.
landing.heroStack: LMS + Exams + AI + Gamification + Certificates + Chat
landing.featuresSubtitle: Eight integrated systems working together to power your organization
landing.whyUsSubtitle: A complete education operating system built for organizations that need more than a simple learning platform
landing.why1Desc: Not just content delivery — courses, exams, certificates, gamification, and communication in one integrated product.
landing.why2Desc: Multi-tenant architecture designed for schools, academies, and companies — not individual creators.
landing.why3Desc: Generate lessons, create exams, and evaluate open-ended answers with built-in AI capabilities.
landing.why4Desc: Role-based access control, audit logging, anti-cheat systems, and enterprise-grade data security.
landing.why5Desc: From 10 students to 10,000 — SaaS infrastructure that grows with your organization.
landing.why6Desc: Multi-language platform with localized certificates and international payment support.
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Flexible platform that adapts to how you teach
landing.ucSchoolsDesc: Complete K-12 solution with gradebooks, schedules, and parent communication.
landing.ucTrainingDesc: Professional certification programs with progress tracking and verified diplomas.
landing.ucCorporateDesc: Employee onboarding, compliance training, and skill development at scale.
landing.ucOnlineDesc: Fully digital learning with live exams, quizzes, and automated certificates.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization's needs
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Planula
landing.faq1Q: How is this different from a regular LMS?
landing.faq1A: Unlike traditional LMS platforms, Planula is a complete education operating system. It includes live exam rooms with anti-cheat, electronic attendance gradebooks, financial billing, and multi-tenant architecture to manage multiple branches from a single window.
landing.faq2Q: Are there limits on the number of students?
landing.faq2A: Limits depend on your selected plan. «Basic» is perfect for starting and small courses, «Professional» is built for medium-sized learning centers, and «Enterprise» is designed for large networks with no hard limits on student capacity.
landing.faq3Q: Which plans include the AI Manager and Test generation?
landing.faq3A: The full suite of Artificial Intelligence features (the 24/7 AI Assistant on your school page, automated exam question generation, and auto-grading of open answers) is exclusively included in the «Enterprise» plan.
landing.faq4A: Yes. Starting from the «Professional» plan, you can automatically generate and issue PDF certificates featuring a unique verification QR code and multi-language support. The certificates cannot be forged.
landing.faq5Q: Is my data and my students' data secure?
landing.faq5A: Security is built into every layer: we use robust encryption, role-based access control (RBAC), an admin action audit log, and complete data isolation for each organization.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of organizations already using Planula to build better learning experiences.
landing.footerDesc: AI-powered education platform for schools, academies, and organizations worldwide.
landing.featuresPageSubtitle: A complete breakdown of everything Planula offers
landing.pricingPageSubtitle: Transparent pricing for organizations of every size
landing.aboutPageSubtitle: We're building the future of organized education
landing.aboutMissionText: To make world-class education infrastructure accessible to every school, academy, and training center — regardless of size or budget.
landing.aboutProductText: Planula is an AI-powered, multi-tenant education platform that combines course management, exam systems, gamification, certificates, and real-time communication into one integrated solution. Built by educators and engineers who understand the challenges of scaling education.
landing.aboutTeam: Built by a team that cares
landing.aboutTeamText: We're a small, focused team of engineers and educators based in Central Asia. We build software that solves real problems for real organizations.
landing.contactPageSubtitle: Have questions or want a demo? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.contactSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
landing.docsPageSubtitle: Learn how to set up and use Planula
landing.docsGettingStartedDesc: Create your organization, invite teachers, and set up your first course in minutes.
landing.docsCoursesDesc: Build structured courses with modules, rich text lessons, video content, and downloadable materials.
landing.docsExamsDesc: Create exams with multiple question types, launch PIN-protected rooms, and review detailed results.
landing.docsAiDesc: Use AI to generate lesson content, create exam questions, and evaluate open-ended student answers.
landing.docsGamificationDesc: Configure XP, levels, badges, and leaderboards to keep students engaged and motivated.
landing.docsCertificatesDesc: Issue PDF certificates with QR verification, custom templates, and multi-language support.
landing.docsChatDesc: Set up group chats, enable direct messaging, and manage real-time communication within your organization.
landing.docsApiDesc: Connect external tools and services through our REST API and webhook system.

directory.title: Find Your Learning Center
directory.subtitle: Discover the best schools and learning centers in Central Asia
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, city, or subject...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Main control panel. Here is a summary of your activity, upcoming events, and key metrics.
dashboard.t1: Click on widgets to quickly jump to the desired modules.
dashboard.t2: The dashboard adapts to your role: administrators see organization finances, while teachers see their groups.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.desc: Module for creating interactive educational longreads. You can add text, video, formulas, and attach files.
lessons.f3: Access can be configured for specific groups
lessons.t1: Use "/" (slash) in the editor to quickly open the blocks menu.
lessons.t2: Click "AI Generate" to let the neural network create a lesson outline for you based on a topic.

materials.title: Materials
materials.desc: Unified file library. Upload PDFs, presentations, videos, and audios to attach them to lessons or assign to students directly.
materials.t1: Students only see files you explicitly granted access to (or attached to a lesson).

exams.title: Exams (Test Bank)
exams.desc: Here you create the structure of tests and exams, write questions, and configure correct answers.
exams.t1: The exam itself is just a template. For students to start taking it, you need to create an "Exam Room" and select this exam in it.

rooms.title: Exam Rooms
rooms.desc: Live sessions for taking exams. You create a room, set a time, share a link or PIN code with students — and control the process in real-time.
rooms.t1: Share the room link or tell students to enter the PIN code on the "Join" screen.
rooms.t2: You can live-track who is on which question.

quiz_library.title: Quiz Library
quiz_library.desc: Create vibrant, gamified interactive games (Kahoot or Quizizz style). Suitable for a warm-up in class or a quick knowledge check.
quiz_library.t1: Run the quiz on a projector, and let students answer from their phones.

quiz_sessions.title: Quiz History & Games
quiz_sessions.desc: Launch quizzes and view the history of past games with detailed analytics for each player and question.

journal.title: Journal
journal.desc: Gradebook and attendance registry. Track student academic performance by dates.
journal.t1: Students do not see the group journal, they only see their own grades in their personal cabinet.

gradebook.title: Grades (Final)
gradebook.desc: Consolidated grade matrices across all groups. Useful for wrapping up a quarter, semester, or year.

groups.title: Student Groups
groups.desc: Organizing students into classes or groups. A group can be assigned a course, exam, or lesson all at once.

courses.title: Courses (Programs)
courses.desc: Large educational programs uniting lesson modules, exams, and materials.
courses.t1: Create a course and add lessons to it so students can easily navigate the learning structure.

finances.title: Finances (CRM)
finances.desc: Tracking payments, debts, and student subscriptions.
finances.t1: The platform does not deduct money automatically; this module acts as an accounting book (CRM) for your admin.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.desc: Planning classes, lectures, and exams. Displayed as a calendar.
schedule.t1: Assign a class to a group, and it will automatically appear in the calendars of all students in that group.

teacher_analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
teacher_analytics.desc: Principal/Headteacher dashboard. Detailed breakdown of teacher effectiveness and student engagement.

risk_dashboard.title: Risk Traffic Light
risk_dashboard.desc: AI churn prediction module. The system automatically highlights students in red who have started studying poorly or skipping.
risk_dashboard.t1: Pay attention to the "red" zone — contact these students or their parents as soon as possible.

org_settings.title: Organization Settings
org_settings.desc: Global parameters: name, logo, pricing plans, integrations (Telegram, AI), and public profile.
org_settings.t1: Fill out the public profile so your organization appears in the platform's global Directory.
